prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 4.7L V8 (internally designated 'Kappa 4.7L') with forged internals, upgraded to 1,200+ HP via twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos (86mm inducer, 110mm exducer) with custom billet compressor wheels, paired with a bespoke Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate setup and a Motec M190 ECU managing a 32psi boost curve on E85 fuel with a custom 12-injector port injection system (ID1700x side-feed injectors) and a secondary direct injection rail (Bosch Motorsport 10-hole injectors) for optimal atomization and knock resistance

Drivetrain: Upgraded Koenigsegg 6-speed transaxle with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (custom 45% preload) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc carbon clutch (300mm diameter, 4,000Nm torque capacity) paired with a Pankl Racing Systems titanium driveshaft and a custom billet aluminum differential housing for reduced rotational mass and increased rigidity

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and remote reservoirs, paired with a Koenigsegg-developed carbon fiber double-wishbone front and rear setup, reinforced with titanium uprights and spherical bearings from Aurora Bearing Company. Chassis stiffening via a custom titanium roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) and a full carbon fiber monocoque reinforcement kit from RML Group, reducing flex by 28% while adding only 12kg of weight
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full 'Ghost' aero package by Koenigsegg Advanced Aerodynamics Division, featuring a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via Motec ECU), a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated vortex generators (modeled after the Jesko Absolut's underbody), and a fixed rear wing with a NACA duct-fed DRS system (reducing drag by 18% at 250+ km/h). Side skirts are carbon fiber with integrated air curtains (channeling airflow from the front wheel arches to the rear diffuser)

Bodywork: Custom 'Evolution GT' widebody kit by Koenigsegg Design House, extending the fenders by 60mm (front) and 80mm (rear) using pre-preg carbon fiber with a matte 'Frozen Silver' finish. The kit includes a removable carbon fiber hood with a central ram-air scoop (feeding the PT6266 turbos) and a rear clamshell with integrated LED taillights (replacing the stock units) and a titanium mesh grille for the engine bay

Interior & Details: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Saddleback Leather, featuring a custom Koenigsegg 'Evolution GT' embroidered headrests, a MOMO Prototipo EVO steering wheel (with integrated Motec C127 dash display), and a bespoke titanium shift knob (CNC-machined from a single billet, anodized in 'Koenigsegg Blue'). Exterior accents include titanium valve stem caps (engraved with the 'CCR Evolution GT' logo), a custom titanium exhaust tip system (dual 120mm outlets with laser-etched Koenigsegg crest), and a set of forged BBS FI-R wheels (20x11 front, 21x13 rear) with center-lock titanium nuts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear)
